{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230522506DCA1D9AABC2A591DA9C"}"},"total":2063},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7008707514909262600","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"啊~ 感觉超可爱啊，动物啊，人啊，读着很放松，安宁祥和。这里有各种类型的人，有想要亲眼看看的萌"猛"宠，喜欢种田风放松小说的小伙伴们不要错过哦喜欢！！！(♡ ὅ ◡ ὅ )ʃ♡*⁂((✪⥎✪))⁂*"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1631841887,"group_id":"6991076996881058846","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8/vSCgaIyjL5/eOCCNMqCE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/850aa32a8c4b4ae6b97eda86cfa2cbe1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791580&x-signature=e3nOu9pSG3UvJT%2Bn0ka9aKkJbLU%3D","user_id":"201924151610253","user_name":"岳米娥期待"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"201924151610253","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6991076996881058846","book_info":{"abstract":"《悠哉山村大王》
《战神奶爸：悠闲的山村生活》（奶爸带娃的悠哉日常）
低调回到西南小山村的陈牧。
只想带着女儿，当个咸鱼的奶爸
种田，钓鱼，捉螃蟹。
逗猫，遛狗，养点花。
他有神秘空间，内有灵泉妙用万千，还有神树异果芬芳。
没想到，熊猫，雪豹，大狗熊，跑进院子就躺下。
大象，野猪和老虎，更是争先恐后驮着小娃娃。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/c8d8dd67da97fb0a15035e25258bdc57","author":"煌依","author_id":"","book_id":"6991076996881058846","book_name":"战神奶爸：悠闲的山村生活","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#184810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":42,"name":"奶爸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=42&name=奶爸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":493,"name":"钓鱼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=493&name=钓鱼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6991077637892506151","read_count":"18380","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2003414"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"730","tags":"都市种田,都市,乡村,奶爸,空间,钓鱼","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/beb7f34aa9ba06d8143296caa3b2f3b5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779398570&x-signature=WuLLJ0NW9g7vkvST4JGdPaCP6CQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"659324460608493","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.700949e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230522506DCA1D9AABC2A591DA9C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4700,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":20800},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7031152445070115584","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感觉不错，非常好。动物们描写的很真实，很可爱，安宁小朋友也很萌。她接近野生动物们和他们玩耍，亲昵，整体现了人与动物和谐共生的理念，动物也有感情，也懂得感恩。正如人们所说:黄鼠狼回头，不是报恩就是报仇。手中的主人公在带娃的同时和村支书带领村民过上好日子，打造国家景区的理想，正符合了农村农民脱贫攻坚的理念。这书非常不错，偶尔还有些狗粮，啊哈……（五星好评，支持作者大大！希望能继续努力，再接再厉，写更多其他的，或类似的小说！加油）加油！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1637067750,"group_id":"6991076996881058846","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"愿我们在彼此看不到的地方熠熠生辉。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nyb5j7ciNa0KqAmC7XkX4zCDodsCBCZneeo/6EkfiRpa","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787248&x-signature=NtetCP%2BD2YPkYr6bl%2BJMa04hBGU%3D","user_id":"4108190731995155","user_name":"罗布泊的饕餮女"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4108190731995155","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1660609971,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}
